ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., voltage, current, temperature) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor readings */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration of the sensor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name or identifier of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., sedan, SUV, truck) */,
  "battery_type" TEXT /* Type of battery used in the vehicle */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "last_service_date" TEXT /* Date of the last service of the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Total mileage of the vehicle */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Owner or operator of the vehicle */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the vehicle's systems */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_cells" (
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery cell */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the cell belongs to */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Type of battery cell (e.g., lithium-ion, lead-acid) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity of the battery cell in Ah */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date when the battery cell was manufactured */,
  "cycle_count" INTEGER /* Number of charge-discharge cycles the cell has undergone */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the battery cell */,
  "warranty_expiry_date" TEXT /* Warranty expiry date of the battery cell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_cells_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the reading */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the reading belongs to */,
  "reading_value" REAL /* Value of the sensor reading */,
  "reading_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reading was collected */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the reading was taken */,
  "reading_source" TEXT /* Source of the reading (e.g., onboard sensor, external device) */,
  "reading_status" TEXT /* Status of the reading (e.g., valid, invalid, suspect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voltages" (
  "voltage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voltage reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that the voltage value belongs to */,
  "voltage_value" REAL /* Voltage value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voltage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voltages_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currents" (
  "current_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each current reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that the current value belongs to */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("current_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_currents_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperatures" (
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that the temperature value belongs to */,
  "temperature_value" REAL /* Temperature value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperatures_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charge_currents" (
  "charge_current_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge current reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that the charge current value belongs to */,
  "charge_current_value" REAL /* Charge current value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_current_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charge_currents_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charge_voltages" (
  "charge_voltage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each charge voltage reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that the charge voltage value belongs to */,
  "charge_voltage_value" REAL /* Charge voltage value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("charge_voltage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charge_voltages_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_steps" (
  "time_step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time step reading */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reading that the time step value belongs to */,
  "time_step_value" REAL /* Time step value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_steps_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery health metric */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery cell the health metric belongs to */,
  "health_value" REAL /* Calculated battery health value */,
  "health_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health metric was calculated */,
  "health_score" REAL /* Detailed health score */,
  "health_category" TEXT /* Health category (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  "health_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the health metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_health_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES battery_cells ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battery_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery performance metric */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery cell the performance metric belongs to */,
  "performance_value" REAL /* Calculated battery performance value */,
  "performance_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was calculated */,
  "performance_score" REAL /* Detailed performance score */,
  "performance_category" TEXT /* Performance category (e.g., optimal, suboptimal, critical) */,
  "performance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battery_performance_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES battery_cells ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user accessed the system */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, view data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration setting */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration setting */,
  "config_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration setting was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)
